name: Wide Landscape Establishing
description: Environment dominates. Figures small or absent.
hld_patterns: {setting}. A wide establishing view, environment dominating the frame.
{setting}. A sweeping landscape, figures small against the terrain.
{setting}. An environmental wide shot — the place, not the people.

1: {subject}, small against the landscape, lower third of frame.

background_pool: A sweeping river delta seen from altitude, braided water channels cutting through golden grassland, patches of dark forest dotting the floodplain, mountains rising blue on the far horizon, clouds casting massive shadows across the plain

A vast badlands expanse, eroded buttes and striped sedimentary hills in bands of ochre, rust, and cream, dry washes cutting pale lines through the stone, a relentless blue sky overhead with scattered wisps of cloud

An agricultural patchwork seen from a hillside, fields of varying greens and golds divided by hedgerows and stone walls, a brook winding through the valley, a distant farmhouse with smoke from its chimney, oak woodland crowning the far ridge

A dramatic coastline seen end-to-end, sheer cliffs dropping into churning blue water, a natural arch carved by the waves, seabird colonies whitewashing the rock faces, the horizon line sharp and infinite under stratocumulus clouds
action_pool: standing still, looking out at the landscape
arms at their sides, taking in the view
turning slowly, surveying in all directions
shielding their eyes with one hand
